english translation text: BAAZAR KE MANZAR KOI will never forget the scenes of the marketEnglish Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:
BAAZAR KE MANZAR KO, AUR APNE KHULE SARKO BHULI NAHI MAI
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
I WILL NEVER FORGET THE SCENES OF THE MARKET,
AND OUR UNCOVERED HEADS

My bound hands and the shackles of the sick,
I will never forget

THE HIDING SUN, THE DARKNESS OF THE NIGHT
THE STRIKING DAGGERS, THE HEAD ON THE SPEAR…
I WILL NEVER FORGET

urdu transliteration text:
Ek Chand Tha Badlime, Chupta Tha Nikal TaThaParda Dare Khayma Ka, Uthta Kabhi Girta ThaWo Khaimaa E Laila SeHaye Rukhsate Akbar Ko...
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
THE MOON WAS BASHFUL, IT KEPT ON COMING AND GOING,
THE DOOR OF THE TENTS, WOULD OPEN AND CLOSE,
SHE DID NOT FORGET THE TIME WHEN AKBAR DEPARTED FROM THE TENT

urdu transliteration text:
Fizza Ko Mera Bhayi, Maa Kehke Bula Ta Tha,Gham Uska Mere Bhayi, Ye Naam Pe Jataa ThaRutbay Mein Jo Maa Ban KarAyi Usi Madar Ko
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
MY BROTHER USED TO TREAT FIZZA AS HIS MOTHER,
HER SORROW O’ MY BROTHER AT THE MENTION OF HER NAME,
I DID NOT FORGET THE SIGHT OF HER IN THE COURT

THE SWAYING SPEARS AND THE ADVANCES OF SHIMR,
SHE DID NOT FORGET THE HOUSE ENGULFED IN FLAMS
AND THE SNATCHED HIJABS

urdu transliteration text:
Yaad Ata Hai Ek Maa Ka, Wo Khaak Me Das JanaAur Aag Ke Sholo Me, Wo Maa Ka Julas JanaJalte Huwe JuleseLipti Huwi Madar Ko
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
I RECALL THE FALLING OF A MOTHER INTO THE DUST,
IN THE FLAMES THE MOTHER WAS ENGULFED,
SHE DID NOT FORGET THE SCENE OF A MOTHER CLUTCHING DESPERATELY TO THE BURNING CRIB

TILL THIS DAY THERE IS MOURNING AND LAMENTATION,
SHE DID NOT FORGET THE CRYING STONES AND A HEAD ON THESE STONE
